Terms of Service

Last updated: April 22, 2026  ·  Effective: April 22, 2026

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of ListsSync.ai ("Service"), a product of Impact Development Consulting LLC, a Florida limited liability company ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"). By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service.

ListsSync.ai is an evolving product working toward general availability. We may revise features, pricing, and these Terms as the product matures. Material changes will be communicated as described in Section 15.

1. Eligibility

  • You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service
  • You must have the legal authority to enter into this agreement on behalf of yourself or the business you represent
  • Use of the Service is subject to availability in your jurisdiction

2. Account Registration

  • Accounts are created using Google Sign-In. Authentication is handled by Google and Firebase Authentication; we do not receive, store, or have access to your Google password
  • You must provide accurate, complete, and current information, which may include your email address and optional business-profile information (such as use case, team size, and phone number)
  • You are responsible for maintaining the security of the Google account you use to sign in
  • You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
  • Notify us immediately at support@listssync.ai if you suspect unauthorized access
  • You may not create multiple accounts to circumvent restrictions or billing

3. Description of Service

ListsSync.ai is a checklist collaboration and task-verification platform for service businesses — including short-term rental hosts, property managers, cleaning crews, and maintenance teams. The Service allows account holders ("Owners") to create checklists and share them with third parties ("Recipients") for completion and verification. Features include:

  • Checklist and task authoring, including optional photo-proof requirements per task
  • Sharing of checklists with Recipients via email link, using time-limited share tokens
  • Task completion and photo uploads by Recipients, who access shared checklists via a share link and are not required to create an account
  • Automatic translation of checklist content into supported languages using the Google Gemini API (see Sections 6 and 7)
  • Dashboard views of checklist progress and Recipient submissions for Owners

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any feature of the Service at any time with reasonable notice.

4. Subscription Plans & Billing

  • The Service is offered on a subscription basis. Current pricing, including any free trial period, is displayed on our website
  • New paid subscriptions include a 14-day free trial. You will not be charged during the trial, and you may cancel at any time during the trial to avoid being billed (see Section 13)
  • Subscriptions auto-renew at the end of each billing period unless cancelled before the renewal date
  • Payments are processed by Stripe, Inc. By subscribing, you authorize Stripe to charge your payment method on a recurring basis
  • All fees are in USD unless otherwise stated
  • Prices may change with at least 30 days' notice. Continued use of the Service after a price change takes effect constitutes acceptance of the new price

Refund Policy

  • Subscription fees are non-refundable once paid, except as required by applicable law. The 14-day free trial is the intended evaluation period
  • If you cancel mid-period, you retain access through the end of the paid period; no prorated refund is issued
  • In exceptional circumstances — including billing errors, extended Service outages, or technical failures on our end — we may, at our sole discretion, issue credits or refunds

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Violate any applicable law or regulation in your use of the Service
  • Upload checklist content, images, or other materials that infringe the intellectual property, privacy, or other rights of third parties
  • Use the Service to harass, defame, or send unsolicited communications to Recipients
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service, other users' accounts, or the underlying infrastructure
  • Use automated scripts, bots, or scrapers against the Service beyond what we explicitly permit
  • Resell, sublicense, or commercially exploit the Service without written permission
  • Upload malware, spam, harmful code, or images containing illegal or abusive content
  • Interfere with other users' or Recipients' access to the Service
  • Circumvent or tamper with share tokens, rate limits, verification flows, or any technical measure protecting the Service

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules without refund.

6. Your Content

  • You retain ownership of all checklist content, task descriptions, images, and other materials you or your Recipients upload to the Service ("Your Content")
  • By uploading Your Content, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive, worldwide license to host, store, transmit, display, translate, and otherwise process it solely to provide the Service to you and your authorized Recipients
  • This license includes transmitting checklist text to the Google Gemini API for translation, and transmitting Your Content to the subprocessors listed in Section 9
  • You are solely responsible for ensuring Your Content complies with applicable laws and third-party rights, and for obtaining any consents required to share Your Content with Recipients
  • We do not claim ownership of Your Content
  • On request to support@listssync.ai, we will provide an export of your checklist data in a reasonable machine-readable format within a reasonable timeframe (see also Section 13)

7. Intellectual Property

  • The Service — including its software, design, user interface, and documentation — is owned by Impact Development Consulting LLC and protected by applicable intellectual property laws
  • You may not copy, modify, reverse engineer, or create derivative works of the Service
  • Our name, logo, and trademarks may not be used without prior written consent
  • We use third-party artificial-intelligence services (currently Google's Gemini API) to provide translation features. We do not train or operate our own AI models. Checklist text that we transmit to Gemini is subject to Google's applicable terms and policies at the time of transmission
  • We do not use Your Content to train any artificial-intelligence model, whether our own or a third party's

8. Privacy

Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. By using the Service, you consent to our collection and use of data as described in the Privacy Policy.

9. Third-Party Services

The Service relies on third-party platforms, including Stripe (payments), SendGrid (transactional email), Firebase (authentication, storage, hosting), Neon (database hosting), Railway (application hosting), and Google Gemini (AI translation). Operating the Service requires the processing of Your Content by these providers as necessary to deliver features. Their respective terms and privacy policies govern how they handle data they receive. We are not responsible for the availability, reliability, or actions of third-party services.

10. Disclaimers

THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

We do not warrant that:

  • The Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure
  • Translations produced by the Gemini API will be accurate, complete, or appropriate for any particular use. You are responsible for reviewing translations where accuracy is material
  • Photo uploads, checklist submissions, or other Recipient actions will constitute legal proof of task completion in any dispute
  • Use of the Service will produce any particular business outcome

We do not commit to any specific uptime or service-level agreement at this time.

11. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL IMPACT DEVELOPMENT CONSULTING LLC, ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, OR AGENTS BE LIABLE FOR:

  • Any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages
  • Loss of profits, revenue, data, or business opportunities
  • Disputes between you and your Recipients arising from the use of checklists shared via the Service
  • Damages arising from third-party service failures (Stripe, SendGrid, Firebase, Google, and the other subprocessors listed in Section 9)

Our total aggregate liability to you shall not exceed the greater of (a) the amount you paid to us in the three (3) months preceding the claim, or (b) one hundred U.S. dollars (USD $100).

12. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Impact Development Consulting LLC and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Service; (b) Your Content; (c) your violation of these Terms; or (d) your violation of any third-party rights or applicable law.

13. Termination, Cancellation & Data Requests

  • You may cancel your subscription or close your account at any time by emailing support@listssync.ai. We will process the request within a reasonable timeframe
  • We may suspend or terminate your account immediately for material breach of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or non-payment
  • Upon cancellation of a paid subscription, you retain access through the end of the current paid period. After that, your access will revert to the free tier or be deactivated, as applicable
  • Account data is retained for as long as your account remains active. On request to support@listssync.ai, we will provide an export of your checklist data in a reasonable machine-readable format and/or delete your account data within a reasonable timeframe. Billing records are retained for seven (7) years to comply with U.S. accounting requirements
  • Sections 6, 7, 10, 11, 12, and 14 survive termination

14. Governing Law & Disputes

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Florida, and you consent to the personal jurisdiction of those courts. Either party may seek injunctive relief in court for intellectual property violations.

15. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time, including as the Service evolves toward general availability. Material changes will be communicated via email to your account email address or via in-app notice at least 14 days before taking effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date of updated Terms constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree, you must stop using the Service before the effective date.

16. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and us regarding the Service and supersede any prior agreements. If any provision is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in full effect.

17. Contact Us

ListsSync.ai — a product of Impact Development Consulting LLC
Legal: legal@listssync.ai
Support: support@listssync.ai
Website: https://www.listssync.ai
